name: Orange-Pickled Beets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beets and enough water to cover in a 4-quart saucepan; heat to boiling over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook beets until fork tender, about 35-40 minutes.
3. To prepare pickling syrup, heat vinegar, sugar, water, salt, cloves, cinnamon stick, and orange peel to boiling over high heat. Stir once to dissolve sugar. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove and discard cloves, cinnamon stick, and orange peel.
4. Stir orange juice into the mixture and heat until simmering.
5. Wash and rinse a quart jar or two pint jars and lids. Drain beets and rinse with cold water. Cool to easy handling.
6. Peel and pack beets into jars. Add the syrup to cover the beets. Cover jars and refrigerate at least 1 week before serving.
